scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../rest-api && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.check-types: npm run check-types --prefix server && npm run check-types --prefix client && npm run check-types --prefix rest-api
